name: Fullington Auto Bus Co
inc_date: 1908 (historical founding; Fullington Trailways LLC is the modern PA LLC successor, exact LLC formation date not confirmed via PA Dept of State public search)
officers: Family-owned (Fullington family); CEO references in news; specific officer list not retrieved from PA Dept of State
registry_source: PA Department of State Bureau of Corporations and Charitable Organizations (entity number not retrieved via public web search; PA online portal not accessible)
notes: Summit list shows Hollidaysburg, PA HQ at 307 Washington Ave, but the FMCSA carrier records list 316 East Cherry St, Clearfield as physical address for both Fullington carriers. Hollidaysburg likely refers to a school-bus terminal/contract location (Fullington has serviced Hollidaysburg Area SD since 1998). Best legal-entity match for rank 1 (Fullington Auto Bus Co / charter & motorcoach side) is FULLINGTON TRAILWAYS LLC (USDOT 120909). Rank 3 (Fullington School Bus) is the separate school-bus LLC (USDOT 2268876). Company founded 1908; majority sold to RATP Dev ~2009, repurchased by family per State College news. PA Dept of State entity number not confirmed (online portal blocked by TLS/CAPTCHA).

name: Student Bus Co
inc_date: 2007 (per third-party PrivCo profile; specific NY DOS filing date not confirmed via NY DOS public inquiry portal)
officers: Sonny Marquez referenced as manager (unverified); specific officers not retrieved from NY DOS
entity_status: active (NY DOS direct lookup not accessible during this run)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (apps.dos.ny.gov publicInquiry portal returned connection error; entity confirmed active via FMCSA Active status and PrivCo profile)
notes: AMBIGUITY: Summit list shows state=NY but HQ=Fair Lawn, NJ at PO Box 1130. PO Box 1130 Fair Lawn NJ historically belongs to Scholastic Bus Co (USDOT 1129111, now INACTIVE since 2015) which is part of Student Transportation of America (RideSTBus) network. The literal-name match STUDENT BUS CO LLC (USDOT 1641867) is in Orangeburg, NY — a Rockland County/NJ-metro area operator, plausibly the intended target given NY state designation. STUDENT BUS COMPANY INC (USDOT 1128202, 209 power units) is the larger related entity (also Orangeburg mailing). Selected USDOT 1641867 as best literal name match; flag uncertainty.

name: Fullington School Bus
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger (non-business); Not Authorized for interstate for-hire
inc_date: LLC formation date not retrieved via PA Dept of State public search; parent Fullington Auto Bus Company founded 1908; school bus LLC likely formed circa 2009-2012 era (LLC USDOT issued 2012)
officers: Family-owned (Fullington family); specific PA Dept of State officer list not retrieved
registry_source: PA Department of State Bureau of Corporations and Charitable Organizations (online portal blocked by TLS error / not directly accessible)
notes: Strong match: FULLINGTON SCHOOL BUS LLC (USDOT 2268876) at 316 East Cherry St, Clearfield, PA matches Summit input. 243 buses, 237 drivers — sizable school-bus operation across central PA. Sister entity Fullington Trailways LLC (USDOT 120909) handles charter/motorcoach. Both share corporate address. MCS-150 filed 09/05/2025; mileage 2,379,564 for 2024. PA entity-formation date and officer list could not be confirmed via state portal (web search did not surface specific PA Dept of State filing).

name: Care-A-Van
registry_source: FL Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) — direct portal returned 403/CAPTCHA; no confident match found via web search
notes: NO CONFIDENT MATCH. FMCSA SAFER name search for 'CARE-A-VAN' returns only one carrier: CARE-A-VAN (USDOT 2380344) in Hibbing, MN — NOT a Florida match. Variants CARE A VAN and CAREAVAN return zero FMCSA records. Listed address 2002 Bella Vista Way, Port Saint Lucie, FL is part of Bella Vista Apartments (a 268-unit residential community built 2002), suggesting Care-A-Van may be a small/private operator using a residential address, possibly below FMCSA registration thresholds (intrastate, under 15-passenger, or non-commercial). Sunbiz direct search blocked by CAPTCHA; no confident Florida corporate match surfaced via Google. Could be a sole-proprietor or fictitious-name registration in St. Lucie County.

name: First Class Transportation Inc
registry_source: FL Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) — direct portal returned 403/CAPTCHA; multiple FL entities exist with similar names (e.g., FIRST CLASS TRANSPORTATION GROUP CORP. filed 1986, involuntarily dissolved 1987) but no confident match to Hudson, FL / Pasco County address
notes: NO CONFIDENT FMCSA MATCH for Hudson, FL location. FMCSA SAFER 'FIRST CLASS TRANSPORTATION' name search returned 6 carriers — none in Hudson FL or Pasco County (Augusta GA #1714676; Little Rock AR #4153206; Odessa TX #4258235; Rancho Cucamonga CA x2 #2113767 and #2070425; Miami FL #2409103). 'FIRST CLASS BUS SERVICE INC' (USDOT 2871016) is in Orlando, FL (2 power units, intrastate-only, private passenger) — not Hudson. The Summit address 18436 Gentle Breeze Ct, Hudson, FL 34667 is a single-family residence in the Heritage Pines retirement community (Victoria III model); a D&B local-transit listing for that exact address shows 'Dew Shuttle LLC' rather than First Class Transportation Inc. Likely a small intrastate operator below FMCSA registration thresholds, or the entity name was misattributed. Sunbiz direct search blocked by CAPTCHA.
